==== /.src/unnecessaryPipeChain_preview.ts (1 flows) ====

=== Effect Flow ===
Kind: pipeline
Location: 5:23 - 5:85
Root: Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.asVoid).pipe(Effect.as("done"))
Path (5 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=string E=never R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A=1} 1
      ~> [call] -> [2]
  [2] pipeTransformation {effect A=number E=never R=never} step 0: Effect.succeed
      ==> [pipeable] -> [3]
  [3] pipeTransformation {effect A=void E=never R=never} step 1: Effect.asVoid
      ==> [pipeable] -> [4]
  [4] pipeTransformation {effect A=string E=never R=never} step 2: Effect.as
